title: WORDLE
how-to-play-desc: Guess the WORDLE in six tries. Each guess must be a valid five-letter word. Hit the enter button to submit. After each guess, the color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was to the word.
example-correct: The letter {{letter}} is in the word and in the correct spot.
example-present: The letter {{letter}} is in the word but in the wrong spot.
example-absent: The letter {{letter}} is not in the word in any spot.
hard-mode-desc: Any revealed hints must be used in subsequent guesses
